entry.title: Julien added 'Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!'
entry.content: 📚 “Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!” by Liza Minnelli ⭐️ Rated: 4/5 📝 "An all-around surprisingly honest autobiography, told in her own voice and tone. Liza Minnelli doesn’t seem to hide much in this candid account, even if one suspects she may have left a few things for..." 🏷️ #LizaMinnelli

entry.title: Julien added 'This 'n That'
entry.content: 📚 “This 'n That” by Bette Davis ⭐️ Rated: 2/5 📝 "A strangely constructed autobiography, written after Davies’ stroke. It has its good moments, especially when the actress recalls her time on movie sets, but also some odd choices, like a full chapter..." 🏷️ #BetteDavis
